schemas.description: Normalized flight option or flight route search result.
Normalized lodging option result including family-fit and booking-readiness metadata.
Normalized restaurant discovery result including reservation, open-hours, and fit metadata.
Normalized tour/activity result including duration, age-fit, safety, and availability metadata.
Normalized weather context for planning and itinerary risk.
Normalized maps/distance/routing result for timeline validation.
Normalized itinerary validation output combining freshness, timing, source, and risk checks.
Typed tool failure envelope returned instead of prose errors.
